prompt: A photorealistic, raw space agency photo of a Martian landscape with red dirt, scattered rocks, and a hazy orange sky. In the middle ground, two dark stone tablets covered in ancient carved hieroglyphs are jutting out of the ground at a slight angle. In the immediate foreground, the distinct shadow of a Mars rover is cast onto the rocky terrain, indicating the perspective of the photo. Across the top edge of the image, there is a plain white text overlay resembling a raw file name reading "ZCAM_0847_0734291854_678RAD_N0412172ZCAM08050_1100LUJ01.png". The lighting is harsh and realistic, mimicking actual extraterrestrial surface photography.
